issues.reason: The final map has no perceivable special pressure: it contains no net tiles 11-14, and every placed enemy has special=0. This is a composition failure because topology/economy only left special-pressure candidates while the monster stage removed unsupported special claims; the earliest practical repair is economy if the allowed enemy pool remains no-special.
issues.required_change: Add one legal visible special-pressure source on a meaningful route or reward branch, preferably by changing an empty candidate chokepoint such as [11,5] or [7,5] to an allowed net tile 11-14. Preserve connectivity, route compensation, tracked budget counts, and no enemy adjacency; do not annotate specials on current no-special enemy codes.

required_changes: Add a legal visible special-pressure source to the final map; with the current no-special enemy pool, use an allowed net tile 11-14 at a candidate route/reward chokepoint such as [11,5] or [7,5], preserving connectivity and tracked budget.
summary: Topology, dimensions, stairs, connectivity, enemy legality/adacency, key ordering, protected rewards, and tracked budget pass. Final composition fails because it contains no legal special-pressure source.
